description: Placeholder. Update with your analysis of where we are in the credit cycle.
implication: Adjust asset allocation based on credit regime.

phases_historical.name: private_credit_expansion
phases_historical.description: Banks lending freely, credit growth high, asset prices rising.

phases_historical.name: peak_credit
phases_historical.description: Credit standards loosening, leverage maxing, early warnings.
phases_historical.assets: Everything goes up. Risk assets peak.

phases_historical.name: credit_contraction
phases_historical.description: Banks tighten, defaults rise, liquidity dries up.

phases_historical.name: fiscal_dominance_expansion
phases_historical.description: Government becomes marginal spender. Deficits expand. Inflation structural.
phases_historical.assets: Commodities, gold, BTC, real assets outperform.
